title: [codereview-pass2] coap_dtn.c: SenML included but unused; payloads not encoded/decoded per spec and coap_location.c pattern
description: Line 10 includes <lichen/senml.h> but no senml_* calls. deaddrop_post does raw memcpy to storage. Must use senml_encode for DTN message payloads (SenML/CBOR) per 12-apps.md and LICHEN_SENML Kconfig. P1 correctness. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-zt3c.18.1
close_reason: explored coap_dtn rpl CCP-channel-sync Rust/Python/Zephyr; precise edits no comments/statics/bounds/LICHEN_prefix; verified cargo test pytest west+clippy ruff no test mods; closed
